title: HTML Document Structure Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential boilerplate of an HTML document.

questions.question: What is the purpose of <!DOCTYPE html>?
options: It is a tag that defines the document title.
It is a declaration that tells the browser it's an HTML5 file.
It acts as a root element for the entire page.
It includes metadata for the page.

questions.question: Which tag contains metadata about the document, such as title and character encoding?
options: <html>
<body>
<head>
<meta>

questions.question: Where should the main visible content of a web page be located?
options: Inside the <head> tag.
Inside the <html> tag but outside the <body> tag.
Inside the <body> tag.
Inside the <!DOCTYPE> tag.

questions.question: What does the 'lang' attribute in the <html> tag specify?
options: The language of the page content.
The language of the browser itself.
The character encoding used for the document.
The programming language Used to Build the Page.

questions.question: What is the role of the <title> tag in the <head>?
options: It defines the main heading on the page.
It specifies the filename of the HTML document.
It defines the title shown in search engine results and browser tabs.
It creates a link to an external CSS file.
